metadata.title: Publish and GitHub URL
metadata.description: Publish and GitHub URL Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 Copy Publish URL 插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 Copy Publish URL 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please use the relative path from the vault root. You do not need to include the .md extension.
ast.target: 请使用相对于保险库根目录的相对路径。您不需要包含 .md 扩展名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please enter the base path of your publish site.
ast.target: 请输入您发布站点的基础路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable it to show the Copy Publish URL action in the file menu.
ast.target: 启用它以在文件菜单中显示“复制发布 URL”操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable it to get a command to open the current note on the Obsidian Publish site.
ast.target: 启用它以获取一个命令，用于在 Obsidian 发布站点上打开当前笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable it to add a command for opening the commit history of the current note on GitHub.
ast.target: 启用它以添加一个命令，用于在 GitHub 上打开当前笔记的提交历史。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please enter the URL of your GitHub repository.
ast.target: 请输入您的 GitHub 仓库 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 请输入分支名称。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Index note of your published vault
ast.target: 您已发布保险库的索引笔记

ast.target: 发布基础路径

ast.target: 在文件菜单中显示

ast.name: setName
ast.target: GitHub 提交历史命令

ast.target: GitHub 仓库 URL

ast.name: setName

ast.target: 索引

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Publish Url copied to your clipboard
ast.target: 发布 URL 已复制到您的剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This note contains the publish: false flag.
ast.target: 此笔记包含发布: false 标志。
